# Module Map
<!-- Auto-generated by sentinel scan on 2026-06-22 -->

Stow is the single deployment spine; Sketchybar is the runtime integration hub wiring window-manager events, display modes, and media/billing status into one bar. Shell aliases dispatch the Bun/Bash automation under `scripts/scripts/`. A display-automation subsystem (sleepwatcher → bd-wake → display-restore + bd-apply) keeps layout/brightness stable across display-wake, and a generated Stream Deck profile fires Raycast script-commands into the same scripts.

```mermaid
graph TD
  install["install.sh"] --> stow["GNU Stow"]
  install --> brew["Homebrew (Brewfile)"]
  install --> tpm["TPM (tmux plugins)"]
  install --> lazy["lazy.nvim"]
  stow --> shell["zsh / starship / mise"]
  stow --> wm["AeroSpace (tiling WM)"]
  stow --> bar["Sketchybar"]
  stow --> editor["Neovim (lua/sethy)"]
  stow --> term["Ghostty + Tmux"]
  shell -->|aliases invoke| scripts["scripts/scripts/*.ts,*.sh"]
  scripts --> bun["Bun runtime"]
  scripts --> bd["BetterDisplay CLI"]
  scripts --> dp["displayplacer (layout)"]
  install --> setup["setup.sh: render LaunchAgent templates + link Raycast cmds"]
  setup --> sw["com.lucas.sleepwatcher"]
  sw -->|"-w system wake / -W display wake"| wake["bd-wake.sh (~/.wakeup)"]
  wake --> restore["display-restore.sh"]
  wake --> apply["bd-apply.sh"]
  restore --> dp
  apply --> bd
  setup --> ray["raycast/script-commands (display-*, bd-*)"]
  sd["Stream Deck profile (streamdeck-build.ts)"] -->|"raycast:// via runopen"| ray
  ray --> restore
  ray --> apply
  bar -->|workspace events| wm
  bar -->|display modes| bd
  bar -->|scene control| obs["OBS scripts"]
  bar -->|now playing| media["Spotify / Music"]
  bar -->|billing/status| cc["Claude Code"]
  scripts -.->|per-rig overrides| env["~/.config/dotfiles/personal.env"]
```
